name: general_qa
description: Tests general response quality with rubric grading

cases.rubric: Response should mention: plants, sunlight, carbon dioxide, oxygen, energy. Should be clear and accurate.

cases.input: Explain what an API is in simple terms
cases.rubric: Response should explain APIs as interfaces between software systems. Should use simple language and ideally include an analogy. Should not be overly technical.
Response should mention the water cycle: evaporation, condensation, precipitation. Should be factually correct.
